title: Ok has ANYTHING of evangelion Q actually been released
display_title: Ok has ANYTHING of evangelion Q actually been released
wikitext:
[]: Ok has ANYTHING of evangelion Q actually been released?             Quote Post by movieartman » Sun Mar 30, 2014 2:30 am Ok I just finished watching 2.0 (HAVE NOT WATCHED 3.0 PLEASE NO SPOILERS) Ok the preview for evangelion q at the end, has any of it been released on any level? Are there plans to? I know none of the footage happens in 3.0, but I see threads, making it sound like more footage has been seen than just what is at the end of 2.0. Really appreciate any info you can give me on this. Thanks guys

[]: Re: Ok has ANYTHING of evangelion Q actually been released?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Mar 30, 2014 4:44 am movieartman wrote: Ok I just finished watching 2.0 (HAVE NOT WATCHED 3.0 PLEASE NO SPOILERS)

[]: Re: Ok has ANYTHING of evangelion Q actually been released?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Mar 30, 2014 9:22 am movieartman wrote: Ok the preview for evangelion q at the end, has any of it been released on any level?

[]: Re: Ok has ANYTHING of evangelion Q actually been released?             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Mar 30, 2014 9:31 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Those previews are produced as part of the previous movie. They're not actual next movie footage.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Mar 30, 2014 10:05 am There was not touching up between 1.0 preview and 2.0. Every single shot was completely redone from scratch. Some of the shots in the preview also never made it into actual 2.0. The point is they make it when they're making the previous movie. Then they go on a break once it's done. Only when they come back and start the new production does actual next movie footage get produced.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Mar 30, 2014 10:57 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: There was not touching up between 1.0 preview and 2.0. Every single shot was completely redone from scratch. Some of the shots in the preview also never made it into actual 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Mar 30, 2014 1:29 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I'd do one for 3.0, but what would be the point?
